universeInfo.label: 6 equity sleeves + Treasuries (+ cash)
universeInfo.description: Six equity sleeves, plus U.S. Treasuries at 2Y/5Y/10Y. Dynamic strategies may also leave residual wealth in cash, so the effective investable set includes a cash sleeve.

specInfo.description: PLS-based factor-zoo candidate; with horizon H=1; and k=2 latent components.
